results.title: Ukraine Confirms 1,000-km Special Forces Drone Strike on Baltic Base
results.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky and the Special Operations Forces confirmed on Saturday, June 6, 2026, that domestic drone units completed a 1,000-kilometer deep strike operation targeting the Russian Baltic Fleet base at Kronstadt. The coordinated assault, executed by the SSO’s “Deep Strike” units alongside the Unmanned Systems Forces (SBS) and the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU), bypassed regional air defenses to ignite fires within the naval hub and navy ammunition arsenals near St. Petersburg.

results.title: Restraining Israel Is Not the Answer
results.description: Donald Trump is not known for hewing to convention, but this week he seemed to rerun a standard Beltway drama. During a phone call on Monday, the president called Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu "crazy" and pressured him to rein in the Israeli offensive in Lebanon. Two days later, the State Department announced it had brokered a ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon. The post Restraining Israel Is Not the Answer appeared first on .

results.title: Asian Games 2026: Shreyas Iyer to lead India; Tilak Varma is deputy
